message:
feat(server): overhaul web dashboard with screen metadata, delta streaming, and full HTML/JS client

- Extend FrameStore::capture to accept screen_key and screen_title for
  per-screen routing and display
- Add warming/inactive retry constants for poll clients
- Include screen_key and screen_title in snapshot and delta JSON payloads
- Rewrite web dashboard HTML/JS client with screen selector tabs,
  keyboard navigation, zoom controls, connection status indicator, and
  dark theme; renders TUI cells as colored spans with proper fg/bg/bold/
  italic/underline attributes
- Add /web-dashboard route alongside existing /web-dashboard/poll and
  /web-dashboard/input endpoints
- Pre-serialize both snapshot and delta payloads during capture to keep
  poll serving at near-zero cost

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
